mnemonics.title: Procurement Steps
mnemonics.content: I S R P O R - Identify Need → Select Supplier → Request Quotation → Purchase Order → Receive goods → Review/Payment

mnemonics.title: Vendor Evaluation Criteria
mnemonics.content: P Q D T F C P - Price, Quality, Delivery, Technical capability, Financial stability, Compliance, Past performance

acronyms.usage: Internal document requesting procurement of goods/services
Formal document authorizing purchase from vendor - legally binding
Document sent to vendors requesting price quotes for specific items
Document requesting detailed proposals for comprehensive solutions
Complete lifecycle cost of IT asset including acquisition, operation, maintenance, disposal
Contract defining expected service levels and performance metrics
Items and services for maintaining equipment and operations
Internet-based systems for conducting procurement processes

visualTips.visualization: Draw a circular diagram with arrows: Need Identification → Supplier Selection → Requisition → PO → Receipt → Payment → (back to Need)
Draw an iceberg diagram - visible costs above water (purchase price, shipping) and hidden costs below (maintenance, training, support, downtime, disposal)
Create a 2x2 matrix: High Value-Low Risk (strategic partners), High Value-High Risk (manage closely), Low Value-Low Risk (transactional), Low Value-High Risk (reduce dependency)
Top-down flow chart: Requisition → RFQ/RFP → Quotation/Proposal → PO → Contract → Goods Receipt → Invoice → Payment

analogies.analogy: Like ordering food at a restaurant: You decide what you need (need ID), look at the menu and ask prices (RFQ), decide which restaurant (vendor selection), place your order (PO), receive food and check it (receipt), pay the bill (payment)
Like buying a car - purchase price is only the down payment; you must consider fuel, insurance, maintenance, repairs, and eventual disposal costs
Like building a reliable team - you don't just hire anyone for one task; you develop long-term relationships with trusted team members who understand your needs
Like online shopping - faster, transparent, can compare multiple sellers easily, track orders digitally, and maintain records automatically
